TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pakwari, title = Pakwari, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pakwari} }

S.FORM: Pakwari Itiniay i Tai'an Cen no Miaoli ko Pakwari a niyaro', 109 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 341 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 57% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 193 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 43% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 148 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 51%, Amis 2%, Saysiyat 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: pakwari itiniaj i taiʡan ʦən no~u miao~uɾi ko~u pakwari a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, sajsijat *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ʦo~uo~u~u *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Pakwari Itiniay i Tai'an Cen no Miaoli ko Pakwari a niyaro', 109 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 341 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 57% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 193 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 43% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 148 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 51%, Amis 2%, Saysiyat 2%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: pakwari itiniaj i taiʡan ʦən no~u miao~uɾi ko~u pakwari a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, sajsijat *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ʦo~uo~u~u *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
